channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Hindsight Is Rose-Colored Glasses (with Izzy Roland)
item.description:
Izzy Roland joins Brennan to discuss her D&D origins, romance in TTRPGs, and The Real Housewives.

Duration: 1:40:31

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland
